feed.title: SkillsLLM
feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama (blog, MCP servers, release notes)

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: nber-cli
entry.content: Use NBER-CLI to search, inspect, download, and serve NBER working paper workflows.

entry.title: cps-cx
entry.content: Customer experience, journey mapping, VoC analytics, NPS programs, service blueprinting.

entry.title: cps-ai-research
entry.content: AI-assisted secondary research with source triangulation and citation chains.

entry.title: cps-ind-agritech
entry.content: Agriculture & agritech — crop economics, irrigation, food traceability, climate-smart agriculture.

entry.title: cps-ai-contracts
entry.content: AI contract review — clause extraction, risk scoring, confidence-gated exports.

entry.title: cps-ai-regs
entry.content: AI regulatory tracking — gazette/circular monitoring, freshness gating, jurisdiction tags.

entry.title: cps-ai-personas
entry.content: AI persona synthesis — interview clusters, journey personas, evidence-anchored quotes.

entry.title: cps-ai-translate
entry.content: AI bilingual deliverables — domain glossary enforcement, AR/EN parity checks.

entry.title: cps-ind-logistics
entry.content: Logistics & 3PL — fleet, warehousing, last-mile, freight, port operations.

entry.title: cps
entry.content: Core Path Strategies — Universal Consulting Engagement Management. Session lifecycle, executable quality gates, document generation, branding, Big 3 frameworks, and the per-project knowledge brain.

entry.title: cps-gov
entry.content: E-government services, policy analysis, transparency, citizen services.

entry.title: cps-ind-telecom
entry.content: Telecom, 5G, OSS/BSS, ARPU, churn.

entry.title: cps-iso
entry.content: Gap analysis, management system design, audit preparation (9001/27001/42001/14001/45001/22301).

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: cps-ind-maritime
entry.content: Ports, vessels, IMO/MARPOL/SOLAS regulations.

entry.title: cps-coe
entry.content: KPI frameworks, BI dashboards, data architecture, COE operating models.

entry.title: cps-data
entry.content: Data strategy, architecture, governance, lineage, classification, MDM.

entry.title: cps-supply
entry.content: Supply chain strategy, sourcing, logistics, supplier risk, S&OP.

entry.title: skyux-sidekick
entry.content: Use for ANY Angular or SKY UX frontend work — building a new SPA, adding a component, fixing a bug, migrating, modernizing, writing specs, or styling. Forces consultation of the bundled SKY UX documentation in references/ before any code is written and produces a concrete, citation-backed implementation plan that the work must follow.

entry.title: cps-ind-retail
entry.content: Omnichannel, POS, inventory, customer.

entry.title: cps-ind-finserv
entry.content: Banking, insurance, fintech, AML, fraud.

entry.title: cps-finance
entry.content: Core Path Strategies — Financial Analysis & Project Finance. Analyst foundation (accounting, three-statement, ratios, amortization) plus banking-grade bankability suite (tornado, Monte Carlo, spider, scenario, break-even) for infrastructure and feasibility work.

entry.title: cps-aai
entry.content: Process automation, RPA/IPA, multi-agent systems, automation ROI.

entry.title: cps-esi
entry.content: ERP/HIS/LMS integration, API design, system architecture, migration planning.

entry.title: cps-ind-energy
entry.content: Utilities, renewables, grid, oil & gas.

entry.title: cps-ind-education
entry.content: K-12 to higher ed, accreditation, LMS.

entry.title: cps-ops
entry.content: Operational excellence, lean six sigma, value stream mapping, process redesign.

entry.title: cps-ind-healthcare
entry.content: HIS, HIPAA, clinical workflows, HL7/FHIR.

entry.title: cps-ind-manufacturing
entry.content: Production, supply chain, quality, MES.

entry.title: cps-ind-government
entry.content: E-government, policy, transparency.

entry.title: cps-cyber
entry.content: Cybersecurity advisory, ISO 27001 readiness, threat modeling, secure-by-design reviews.

entry.title: hi_flow
entry.content: Feature-and-above solo+AI development methodology: human-originated intake, product specs, Project State, architecture gates, Behavior Registry, behavior migration, contract-preserving bug fixes, implementation plans, foundation wiring, and delivery rails.

entry.title: cps-dig
entry.content: Strategic roadmaps, maturity assessments, change management, business cases.

entry.title: cps-esg
entry.content: ESG strategy, sustainability reporting, carbon accounting, CSRD/GRI/SASB alignment.

entry.title: cps-risk
entry.content: Enterprise risk management, ERM frameworks, control mapping, BCP/DR.

entry.title: cps-str
entry.content: Market intelligence, financial modeling, operations excellence, organizational design.

entry.title: cps-aig
entry.content: ISO 42001:2023, AI readiness, governance frameworks, bias testing, policy.

entry.title: cps-mar
entry.content: Port operations, fleet management, maritime compliance (IMO, MARPOL, SOLAS).

entry.title: cps-ind-realestate
entry.content: Property, building, lease, REIT, cap rate.

entry.title: cps-pmo
entry.content: PMO setup, portfolio governance, program management, RAID, status pack automation.

entry.title: cps-kg-enhance
entry.content: Knowledge brain enhancement (v2.2 any-format ingestion + engagement intelligence): per-type document conversion (PDF via Marker OCR, DOCX via python-docx, PPTX via python-pptx, images via PIL→Marker) to markdown entities, version tracking via frontmatter, bilingual entity resolution, adversarial fact-checking, plus read-only brain mining — trace theme evolution, surface evidenced-but-unaddressed gaps, and adversarially challenge a recommendation's premise.

entry.title: cps-cloud
entry.content: Cloud strategy, FinOps, migration, well-architected reviews, multi-cloud governance.

entry.title: cps-edu
entry.content: K-12 performance, curriculum analytics, higher ed faculty evaluation, accreditation.

entry.title: cps-hlt
entry.content: Clinical workflow optimization, HIS implementation (HL7/FHIR), HIPAA compliance.

entry.title: git-guardrails
entry.content: GitHub Flow を構造強制するプラグイン。デフォルトブランチ (master/main) への直接書き込み経路 (commit / push / master/main を head とする PR 作成) を PreToolUse hook で deny し、変更を GitHub 上の PR merge 経由のみに限定する。

entry.title: agent-memory
entry.content: 永続的なメモリ管理 - 会話を超えて情報を保存・参照

entry.title: legion
entry.content: Institutional memory for Claude Code agents with real-time team channel.

entry.title: ctoc
entry.content: Your Virtual CTO — 60 AI agents. 265 expert skills. 15 quality gates.

entry.title: domain-chassis
entry.content: Shared operational methodology for all domains. Gate-based validation, session context loading, and structured document review.

entry.title: fuse-design
entry.content: Design Director for websites, web apps, iOS, and Android. Generates HTML/CSS directly (Gemini Design MCP, Magic/21st.dev, and shadcn MCP are optional). iOS/Android produce tokens + a device-framed mockup + a handoff spec, never SwiftUI/Compose. Design method, design system tokens, motion, UX copy, and a deterministic design-review gate. Anti-AI-Slop, WCAG 2.2.

entry.title: Learning Orchestrator MCP
entry.content: Learning Orchestrator MCP

entry.title: Yarrow
entry.content: Yarrow

entry.title: content-creator
entry.content: SEO-optimized marketing content with brand voice analysis, content frameworks, and social media templates.

entry.title: product-manager
entry.content: Product management toolkit with RICE scoring, customer interview analysis, and PRD generation.

entry.title: a11y-audit
entry.content: WCAG 2.2 accessibility audit and fix skill for React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte, and HTML. Static scanner detecting 20+ violation types, contrast checker with suggest mode, framework-specific fix patterns, CI-friendly exit codes.

entry.title: aws-architect
entry.content: AWS serverless architecture design with IaC templates, cost optimization, and CI/CD pipelines.

entry.title: dignified-python
entry.content: Production-tested Python coding standards with version-aware type annotations, LBYL exception handling, and modern typing patterns. Includes guides for CLI patterns, subprocess handling, and Python 3.10-3.13 features.

entry.title: ra-qm-skills
entry.content: 12 regulatory affairs & quality management skills for HealthTech/MedTech: ISO 13485 QMS, MDR 2017/745, FDA 510(k)/PMA, GDPR/DSGVO, ISO 27001 ISMS, CAPA management, risk management, clinical evaluation, and more. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: dagster-expert
entry.content: Comprehensive Dagster development conventions and best practices

entry.title: agenthub
entry.content: Multi-agent collaboration plugin for Claude Code. Spawn N parallel subagents that compete on code optimization, content drafts, research approaches, or any problem that benefits from diverse solutions. Evaluate by metric or LLM judge, merge the winner. 7 slash commands, agent templates, git DAG orchestration, message board coordination.

entry.title: business-growth-skills
entry.content: 4 business & growth skills: customer success manager, sales engineer, revenue operations, and contract & proposal writer. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: skill-security-auditor
entry.content: Security audit and vulnerability scanner for AI agent skills. Scans for malicious patterns, prompt injection, data exfiltration, and unsafe file operations.

entry.title: engineering-advanced-skills
entry.content: 30 advanced engineering skills: agent designer, agent workflow designer, AgentHub, RAG architect, database designer, migration architect, observability designer, dependency auditor, release manager, API reviewer, CI/CD pipeline builder, MCP server builder, skill security auditor, performance profiler, Helm chart builder, Terraform patterns, and more. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: bmad-method-lifecycle
entry.content: Full-lifecycle AI development framework — agents and workflows for product analysis, planning, architecture, and implementation.

entry.title: executive-mentor
entry.content: Adversarial thinking partner for founders and executives. Stress-tests plans, prepares for board meetings, navigates hard decisions, and forces honest post-mortems.

entry.title: docker-development
entry.content: Docker and container development agent skill and plugin for Dockerfile optimization, docker-compose orchestration, multi-stage builds, and container security hardening. Covers build performance, layer caching, and production-ready container patterns.

entry.title: self-improving-agent
entry.content: Curate auto-memory, promote learnings to CLAUDE.md and rules, extract proven patterns into reusable skills.

entry.title: engineering-skills
entry.content: 26 production-ready engineering skills: architecture, frontend, backend, fullstack, QA, DevOps, security, AI/ML, data engineering, Playwright (9 sub-skills), self-improving agent, Stripe integration, TDD guide, Google Workspace CLI, a11y audit (WCAG 2.2), and more. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: terraform-patterns
entry.content: Terraform infrastructure-as-code agent skill and plugin for module design patterns, state management strategies, provider configuration, security hardening, and CI/CD plan/apply workflows. Covers mono-repo vs multi-repo, workspaces, policy-as-code, and drift detection.

entry.title: demand-gen
entry.content: Multi-channel demand generation, paid media optimization, SEO strategy, and partnership programs.

entry.title: dagster-integrations
entry.content: Comprehensive index of 82+ Dagster integrations for cloud platforms, data warehouses, ETL tools, AI/ML, and more

entry.title: helm-chart-builder
entry.content: Helm chart development agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw — chart scaffolding, values design, template patterns, dependency management, security hardening, and chart testing.

entry.title: code-to-prd
entry.content: Reverse-engineer any codebase into a complete Product Requirements Document (PRD). Analyzes routes, components, models, APIs, and interactions for frontend (React, Vue, Angular, Next.js), backend (NestJS, Django, Express, FastAPI), and fullstack applications.

entry.title: autoresearch-agent
entry.content: Autonomous experiment loop that optimizes any file by a measurable metric. 5 slash commands, 8 evaluators, configurable loop intervals (10min to monthly).

entry.title: google-workspace-cli
entry.content: Google Workspace administration via the gws CLI. Install, authenticate, and automate Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Calendar, Docs, Chat, and Tasks. 5 Python tools, 3 reference guides, 43 built-in recipes, 10 persona bundles.

entry.title: pm-skills
entry.content: 6 project management skills: senior PM, scrum master, Jira expert, Confluence expert, Atlassian admin, and template creator for Atlassian users. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: finance-skills
entry.content: 2 finance skills: financial analyst (ratio analysis, DCF valuation, budgeting, forecasting) and SaaS metrics coach (ARR, MRR, churn, CAC, LTV, NRR, Quick Ratio, 12-month projections). 7 Python automation tools. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: scrum-master
entry.content: Sprint health analysis, velocity tracking, and retrospective facilitation.

entry.title: open-code-review
entry.content: Perform AI code review on Git diffs — supports workspace changes, branch ranges, and single commits with concurrent per-file analysis, codebase search, and deep context-aware review.

entry.title: research-summarizer
entry.content: Structured research summarization agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI. Summarize academic papers, compare web articles, extract citations, and produce actionable research briefs.

entry.title: product-skills
entry.content: 14 production-ready product skills: product manager toolkit (RICE, PRDs), agile product owner, product strategist, UX researcher, UI design system, competitive teardown, landing page generator, SaaS scaffolder, product analytics, experiment designer, product discovery, roadmap communicator, code-to-prd, research summarizer. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: slidev
entry.content: Evidence-based presentation creation with Slidev, enforced design guardrails, and multi-platform diagrams

entry.title: prompt-optimizer
entry.content: Analyze and optimize AI prompts for better results

entry.title: readme-generator
entry.content: Smart README generation from project analysis

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: smart-commit
entry.content: Intelligent git commits with conventional format, semantic analysis, and changelog generation

entry.title: regex-builder
entry.content: Build, test, and debug regular expression patterns

entry.title: rapid-prototyper
entry.content: Quick prototype scaffolding with minimal viable structure

entry.title: release-manager
entry.content: Semantic versioning management and automated release workflows

entry.title: test-writer
entry.content: Generate comprehensive unit and integration tests with full coverage

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security best practices advisor with vulnerability detection and fixes

entry.title: unit-test-generator
entry.content: Generate comprehensive unit tests for any function or module

entry.title: schema-designer
entry.content: Database schema design and ERD generation

entry.title: python-expert
entry.content: Python-specific development with type hints and idiomatic refactoring

entry.title: terraform-helper
entry.content: Terraform module creation and infrastructure planning

entry.title: claude-mem
entry.content: Persistent memory system for Claude Code - seamlessly preserve context across sessions with semantic search

entry.title: visual-regression
entry.content: Visual regression testing with screenshot comparison

entry.title: workflow-optimizer
entry.content: Development workflow analysis and optimization recommendations

entry.title: c-level-skills
entry.content: 28 C-level advisory skills: complete virtual board of directors with CEO, CTO, COO, CPO, CMO, CFO, CRO, CISO, CHRO advisors, executive mentor, founder coach, Chief of Staff router, board meetings, decision logger, board deck builder, scenario war room, competitive intel, org health diagnostic, M&A playbook, international expansion, culture architect, change management, strategic alignment, and more. Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entry.title: ultrathink
entry.content: Deep analysis mode with extended reasoning for complex problems

entry.title: refactor-engine
entry.content: Extract functions, simplify complex code, and reduce cognitive complexity

entry.title: product-shipper
entry.content: Ship features end-to-end with launch checklists and rollout plans

entry.title: ruflo-core
entry.content: Foundation plugin — registers the ruflo MCP server (300+ tools across memory/agentdb/embeddings/hooks/aidefence/neural/autopilot/browser/agent/swarm), provides 3 generalist agents (coder/researcher/reviewer), 3 first-run skills, and a curated plugin-discovery catalog

entry.title: ruflo-workflows
entry.content: Workflow automation with templates, orchestration, and lifecycle management — wraps 10 workflow_* MCP tools (create/run/execute/status/list/pause/resume/cancel/delete/template) with full state-machine lifecycle (created → running ↔ paused → completed/cancelled)

entry.title: ruflo-observability
entry.content: Structured logging, distributed tracing, and metrics — correlate agent swarm activity with application telemetry

entry.title: ruflo-ddd
entry.content: Domain-Driven Design scaffolding — bounded contexts, aggregate roots, domain events, value objects, repositories, and anti-corruption layers; navigable domain graph stored in AgentDB

entry.title: ruflo-knowledge-graph
entry.content: Knowledge graph construction — entity extraction, relation mapping, and pathfinder graph traversal

entry.title: ruflo-security-audit
entry.content: Security review, dependency scanning, policy gates, and CVE monitoring

entry.title: ruflo-sparc
entry.content: SPARC methodology — Specification, Pseudocode, Architecture, Refinement, Completion phases with gate checks

entry.title: typescript-lsp
entry.content: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: ruflo-agent
entry.content: Agent runtimes for ruflo — local WASM-sandboxed agents (rvagent: 10 wasm_agent_*/wasm_gallery_* MCP tools, built on @ruvector/rvagent-wasm + @ruvector/ruvllm-wasm per ADR-070) plus Anthropic Claude Managed Agents as a cloud backend (managed_agent_* MCP tools per ADR-115). One interface, local-vs-cloud runtimes.

entry.title: ruflo-ruvector
entry.content: Self-learning vector database via npx ruvector@0.2.25 — HNSW, adaptive LoRA embeddings, code-graph clustering, hooks routing, brain/SONA, 103 MCP tools

entry.title: ruflo-aidefence
entry.content: AI safety scanning, PII detection, prompt injection defense, and adaptive threat learning

entry.title: ruflo-ruvllm
entry.content: RuVLLM local inference with chat formatting (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Ollama/Cohere), model configuration, MicroLoRA fine-tuning, and SONA real-time adaptation

entry.title: skill-creator
entry.content: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

entry.title: ruflo-rag-memory
entry.content: RuVector memory with HNSW search, AgentDB, and semantic retrieval

entry.title: ruflo-goals
entry.content: Long-horizon goal planning, deep research orchestration, and adaptive replanning using GOAP algorithms

entry.title: ruflo-adr
entry.content: ADR lifecycle management — create, index, supersede, check compliance, and link Architecture Decision Records to code via AgentDB hierarchical store + causal edges (supersedes/amends/depends-on/related)

entry.title: ruflo-docs
entry.content: Documentation generation, API docs (JSDoc/TSDoc/OpenAPI), and drift detection — drives the `document` background worker via hooks_worker-dispatch; uses Haiku model for cost-efficient docs work

entry.title: ruflo-daa
entry.content: Dynamic Agentic Architecture — 8 daa_* MCP tools for adaptive agents (create/adapt), cognitive patterns, workflows (create/execute), knowledge sharing, and learning/performance metrics. Feeds the JUDGE phase of the 4-step intelligence pipeline.

entry.title: hookify
entry.content: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns

entry.title: greptile
entry.content: AI code review agent for GitHub and GitLab. View and resolve Greptile's PR review comments directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: pr-review-toolkit
entry.content: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entry.title: plugin-dev
entry.content: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

entry.title: code-simplifier
entry.content: Agent that simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality

entry.title: lua-lsp
entry.content: Lua language server for code intelligence

entry.title: mcp-server-dev
entry.content: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude — guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.

entry.title: context7
entry.content: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.

entry.title: frontend-design
entry.content: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation

entry.title: gerrit
entry.content: Gerrit code review assistant

entry.title: laravel-boost
entry.content: Laravel development toolkit MCP server. Provides intelligent assistance for Laravel applications including Artisan commands, Eloquent queries, routing, migrations, and framework-specific code generation.

entry.title: gopls-lsp
entry.content: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring

entry.title: claude-code-setup
entry.content: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

entry.title: kotlin-lsp
entry.content: Kotlin language server for code intelligence

entry.title: ruby-lsp
entry.content: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: linear
entry.content: Linear issue tracking integration. Create issues, manage projects, update statuses, search across workspaces, and streamline your software development workflow with Linear's modern issue tracker.

entry.title: learning-output-style
entry.content: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)

entry.title: gitlab
entry.content: GitLab DevOps platform integration. Manage repositories, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and wikis. Full access to GitLab's comprehensive DevOps lifecycle tools.

entry.title: ralph-loop
entry.content: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

entry.title: commit-commands
entry.content: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests

entry.title: claude-md-management
entry.content: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

entry.title: imessage
entry.content: iMessage channel for Claude Code — reads chat.db directly, sends via AppleScript. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /imessage:access.

entry.title: clangd-lsp
entry.content: C/C++ language server (clangd) for code intelligence

entry.title: fakechat
entry.content: Localhost iMessage-style web chat for Claude Code — test surface with file upload and edits. No tokens, no access control.

entry.title: playground
entry.content: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button

entry.title: discord
entry.content: Discord channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

entry.title: feature-dev
entry.content: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

entry.title: asana
entry.content: Asana project management integration. Create and manage tasks, search projects, update assignments, track progress, and integrate your development workflow with Asana's work management platform.

entry.title: firebase
entry.content: Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.

entry.title: pyright-lsp
entry.content: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

entry.content: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: feature-dev
entry.content: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

entry.title: slint
entry.content: Enhances Claude's ability to work with, debug, and build Slint GUI applications

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

entry.title: playground
entry.content: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button

entry.title: prd-workflow

entry.title: exasol
entry.content: Interact with Exasol databases using the exapump CLI tool. Upload CSV/Parquet files, run SQL queries, export data, leverage Exasol-specific SQL features, design tables with DISTRIBUTE BY/PARTITION BY, write UDFs in Python/Java/Lua/R, build custom Script Language Containers, and manage BucketFS files.

entry.content: AI memory system — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, guided setup.

entry.title: SAP MCP-RFC Bridge
entry.content: SAP MCP-RFC Bridge

entry.title: Raindrop MCP Server
entry.content: Raindrop MCP Server

entry.title: fleet
entry.content: Claude Code supervises a multi-provider fleet of AI coding workers (OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini CLI, Claude Code headless, and 75+ providers via OpenCode including DeepSeek, Qwen, and local LM Studio/Ollama models) as background subagents: registry-driven routing by capability, cost, and observed track record; parallel dispatch; per-provider rate-limit cooldowns with cascade fallback; verification-gated acceptance; and an outcome ledger that makes routing smarter with use. NOTE: runs unattended agents (file edits + command execution, no approval prompts) inside your repo — read the README warning before installing; use only in repos you trust. The skill itself follows the Agent Skills open standard and also runs under Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and other compatible supervisors (see install.sh).

entry.title: appdirect
entry.content: Agent skills for AppDirect marketplace work — app submission runbook (100% profile-completion) and platform API integration (OAuth, GraphQL mutations, event endpoints, SSO).

entry.title: ai-sdlc-harness
entry.content: AI-driven SDLC workflow harness for multi-repo development. Provides story refinement, multi-agent development (plan → code → review → test → PR), and automated guardrails via hooks. Supports Azure DevOps, Jira, GitLab, GitHub, Zoho, and local Markdown as work item providers; ADO, GitLab, GitHub, gh-cli, and glab-cli as git providers. Language-agnostic, discovery-driven; supports any language (frontend + backend).

entry.title: bigtable
entry.content: Official Claude plugin for Google Cloud Bigtable. Manage instances/tables, design schemas, query data using SQL or client libraries, and more

entry.title: auto-redbook-skills
entry.content: 小红书笔记自动创作技能：撰写内容、生成精美封面与正文卡片、可选一键发布。支持 8 种排版主题（sketch / neo-brutalism / botanical 等）和 4 种智能分页模式。

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 38 agents, 156 skills, 72 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: calibre-mcp
entry.content: Calibre e-book library MCP server with 21 portmanteau tools for search, management, export, and RAG

entry.title: bkt
entry.content: Bitbucket CLI - manage repos, PRs, branches, issues, webhooks, and pipelines for both Data Center and Cloud

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: dm
entry.content: Dungeon Master assistant for running persistent D&D 5e campaigns. Campaign creation/loading, character management, combat tracking, NPC generation, dice rolling, an optional live display companion, and full session state — all persisted across sessions. Provides the `dnd` skill; invoke as /dm:dnd, or just describe what you want once a campaign is loaded.

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude-compatible academic workflow bundles for producing work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), manuscript drafting and methods writing (nature-writing), reviewer-style pre-submission assessment (nature-reviewer), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt), literature search via MCP (nature-academic-search), paper reading and annotation (nature-reader), and peer-review response drafting (nature-response). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, cover letters, and review articles. Rules are derived from primary sources, including published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: rust-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Rust development assistant with meta-question routing, coding guidelines, version queries, and ecosystem support

entry.title: kicad-happy
entry.content: KiCad electronics design skills. Analyze schematics, review PCB layouts, download datasheets, source components, and prep boards for fabrication.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: panecho
entry.content: Drive the Panecho native macOS terminal (privacy-hardened fork of cmux) from Claude Code — workspaces, panes, surfaces, browser automation, notifications, sidebar metadata, session restore, and the privacy-mode rules agents must respect. Ships the Panecho control skill; pair with the panecho-recipes/ folder for copy-paste socket-API snippets.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: binface64-skills
entry.content: AI agent skills for BF64/Binface64 N64 game development across code, assets, audio, UI, and QA.

entry.title: carbon
entry.content: Build and audit enterprise, data-heavy B2B interfaces with the IBM Carbon Design System: Carbon components (React and Web Components), patterns, IBM Design Language styles and tokens, plus WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility and an axe-based conformance baseline.

entry.title: scholaraio
entry.content: A research infrastructure for AI agents. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. Includes arXiv discovery, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, insights analytics, Office document inspection, scientific tool docs, and academic writing workflows. Requires Python 3.10+ and pip install.

entry.title: claude-cursor-orchestration
entry.content: Claude Code + Cursor Agent orchestration system. Delegates coding tasks to Cursor Agent via ACP bridge with Phase 0-8 pipeline.

entry.title: phobos
entry.content: Always-on efficiency discipline for Claude Code — triage token spend to task size, write minimal correct code, take fewer round-trips, keep context lean. Ships three skills plus guard/state/status hooks.

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 58 agents, 220 skills, 74 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: cc-skills-golang
entry.content: AI Agent Skills for production-ready Go projects

entry.title: humanizer-es
entry.content: Edita textos en español para que suenen naturales y humanos, no generados por IA. Adaptación nativa al español del Humanizer: detecta muletillas de IA, calcos del inglés, nominalización, simetría forzada, tono corporativo, raya al estilo inglés y mayúsculas de título a la inglesa. Maneja variantes (España, Latinoamérica, neutro).

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 64 agents, 261 skills, 84 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: agentmail
entry.content: AI-native email infrastructure for coding agents. Create inboxes, send and receive emails, manage threads, and automate email workflows.

entry.title: medical-mcps
entry.content: Comprehensive biological and medical research data integration server providing unified access to 13+ specialized databases including Reactome (pathways), KEGG (pathways/diseases), UniProt (proteins), ChEMBL (drug discovery), PubMed (literature), GWAS Catalog (genetic associations), ClinicalTrials.gov (clinical trials), OpenFDA (drug safety), Pathway Commons (pathway data), Gene Ontology (gene functions), OMIM (genetic disorders), NCI Thesaurus (cancer terminology), OpenTargets (disease-target associations), and CTG (gene-disease). Offers 100+ tools through both a unified endpoint (all databases via single connection) and individual API endpoints. Features RFC 9111 compliant HTTP caching with 30-day TTL for optimal performance.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Adapted Andrej-Karpathy-style coding guidelines (personal fork)

entry.title: mutsuki
entry.content: Asagi Mutsuki mode. The little-devil chaos tester who breaks what claims to be fine: read the claim, dig the dirt, arm the cruel inputs, throw one bomb, prove the break. Love & Violence. Kufufu~

entry.title: claude-code-settings
entry.content: Claude Code settings and skills for spec-driven development workflows

entry.title: auto-memory
entry.content: Automatically maintains CLAUDE.md files as codebases evolve using hooks, agents, and skills

entry.title: haiku-scribe
entry.content: Read-only Haiku scout subagent that compresses broad context (surveys, logs, transcripts, unfamiliar flow) into structured evidence, saving main-context headroom and stretching the Pro/Max cap.

entry.content: A research infrastructure for AI agents. Search, read, and analyze papers from your local knowledge base while coding. Includes arXiv discovery, layered reading, ingestion, topic modeling, citation graphs, insights analytics, Office document inspection, scientific tool docs, and academic writing workflows. entry.title: armitage-sales-ops
entry.content: Read-only HubSpot sales-operations reporting for Armitage portfolio companies. Config-driven skills — Onboard, Pipeline Health, Rep Scorecard, Deal Review, Lead Sourcing, Views Spec (generates a company-specific HubSpot admin build guide for the drill-down layer), and a board-grade Referral/Channel Growth report. Same code for every company; per-company config lives OUTSIDE the plugin. Never writes to HubSpot.

entry.title: kraken-cli
entry.content: Agent-first CLI for trading crypto, stocks, forex, and derivatives on Kraken. Paper trading by default; live trading opt-in via API keys.

entry.content: Plan-to-code pipeline: automated planning with 5-actor verification, then TDD execution with parallel agents. Formerly beast-plan.

entry.title: dogdoing
entry.content: Dogdoing (刀盾狗/我的刀盾) - A loyal shield-dog that participates in every task, splitting work as a subagent. Cheers with Wow-wow-wow when idle! | 一只永远不会缺席的工作犬，每个任务都插上一爪，没活就旺旺旺喝彩！

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: socraticode
entry.content: Codebase intelligence — semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration for SocratiCode

entry.title: cadre-devkit-claude
entry.content: Cadre team development kit for Claude Code - security hooks, workflow automation, and productivity tools

entry.title: bible-links
entry.content: Make portable route.bible Markdown links the default for Scripture references.

entry.title: ballerina
entry.content: Ballerina language support — LSP code intelligence for .bal files plus an AI coding assistant for writing integrations and services, discovering libraries from Ballerina Central, and running and testing projects.

entry.title: designlang
entry.content: Extract any website's design language and ship it. Five slash commands — /extract, /grade, /battle, /remix, /pack — wrap the designlang CLI to pull DTCG tokens, Tailwind/shadcn/Figma vars, motion + voice, generate shareable graded report cards, head-to-head battle pages, six-vocabulary remixes, and full downloadable design-system bundles.

entry.title: davinci-resolve
entry.content: Accurate DaVinci Resolve scripting API reference for AI agents — method signatures, return types, settings dictionaries, constants, object navigation, and deprecations.

entry.content: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns

entry.title: react-native-storybook
entry.content: Create and edit React Native Storybook stories using Component Story Format (CSF). Includes controls reference, addon configuration, and portable story patterns.

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text, making it sound more natural and human. Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide.

entry.title: adversarial-spec
entry.content: Iteratively refine product specs through multi-model debate until consensus. Claude actively participates alongside GPT, Gemini, Grok, and other models. Includes interview mode, early agreement verification, and optional Telegram integration.

entry.content: Interactive specification interview workflow that conducts in-depth feature interviews using AskUserQuestion and generates comprehensive specs. Lisa plans. Ralph does.

entry.content: Claude Agent SDK Development Plugin

entry.title: commit-commands
entry.content: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests

entry.title: feature-dev
entry.content: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

entry.title: pr-review-toolkit
entry.content: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entry.title: sapui5-cli
entry.content: Manages SAPUI5/OpenUI5 projects using the UI5 Tooling CLI (@ui5/cli). Use when initializing UI5 projects, configuring ui5.yaml or ui5-workspace.yaml files, building UI5 applications or libraries, running development servers with HTTP/2 support, creating custom build tasks or server middleware, managing workspace/monorepo setups, troubleshooting UI5 CLI errors, migrating between UI5 CLI versions, or optimizing build performance. Supports both OpenUI5 and SAPUI5 frameworks with complete configuration and extensibility guidance.

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns
